prompt: Topcoder Arena 3.0 SRM API backlog: extend GET /api/v1/problems so the arena UI can filter problems by arbitrary skill tags (case-insensitive, comma-separated, or array form) and surface the normalized tag filters in the metadata payload. Tag filters must compose with existing difficulty and limit behavior while preserving stable sorting.

schema_hints: Tag filters accept comma-separated strings or arrays and must normalize tags to lowercase in metadata.appliedTags.
Tag filtering composes with other filters (difficulty) and existing 50-result limit.

contract.description: Handle ?tags=<value> case-insensitively and return metadata.appliedTags with normalized lowercase tags.
tests: SRM problem tag filters::filters by a single tag case-insensitively

contract.description: Comma-separated tags (e.g. ?tags=foo,bar) must match problems that contain any requested tag and expose both normalized tags in metadata.appliedTags.
tests: SRM problem tag filters::accepts comma-separated tags and returns merged results

contract.description: tags[]=... array form must work alongside difficulty filters while preserving ordering by roundId and the paging limit.
tests: SRM problem tag filters::accepts array form and combines with difficulty filter

metadata.notes: Allow the SRM problems listing to accept ?tags=foo,bar and expose normalized tags in metadata while preserving pagination and difficulty filters.
